plan.action: Audit lib/summarize.sh to confirm existing summarize_plan, summarize_review, summarize_tests, and summarize_implementation are present and correct. No changes needed if all four exist with correct fields and summary_type values.

Add summarize_architect function to lib/summarize.sh. Extract decision, implementation_notes (or notes), and adr_required from the architect JSON. Retain source_file reference and set summary_type='architect'. Follow the same shape as summarize_plan.
Add 'architect' case to the summarize_artifact dispatcher in lib/summarize.sh so it routes to summarize_architect.

Persist review.json in planning_run_loop (lib/planning.sh). After the reviewer returns 'approve', call a new planning_persist_review helper (or inline) to write review_json to Output/<ticket_id>/review.json before returning. This makes the review a durable artifact that summarize_ticket_artifacts can later process.

Implement summarize_review in lib/summarize.sh (reviewer feedback: this step was missing from the prior plan). Extract decision and feedback array from review.json, retain source_file, set summary_type='review', and include feedback_count. Verify the function already exists before adding; if present and correct, document it here for clarity.

Extend summarize_ticket_artifacts in lib/summarize.sh to also handle review.json (via summarize_review → review_summary.json) and architect.json (via summarize_architect → architect_summary.json), following the same pattern used for plan.json and tests.json.

Add BATS tests in tests/summarize.bats for: (a) summarize_architect returns valid JSON with summary_type='architect', source_file, and key fields; (b) summarize_artifact dispatches to architect summarizer; (c) summarize_ticket_artifacts writes review_summary.json when review.json is present; (d) summarize_ticket_artifacts writes architect_summary.json when architect.json is present.
Add a BATS test in tests/planning.bats verifying that planning_run_loop persists review.json to Output/<ticket_id>/review.json when the reviewer returns 'approve'.
Run the full BATS test suite (bats tests/) and confirm all tests pass including pre-existing tests. Fix any regressions before completing.

testing_recommendations: Test summarize_architect produces valid JSON with summary_type='architect', source_file, and key architect fields (decision, adr_required)
Test summarize_ticket_artifacts writes review_summary.json when Output/<ticket_id>/review.json is present
Test summarize_ticket_artifacts writes architect_summary.json when Output/<ticket_id>/architect.json is present
Test summarize_ticket_artifacts count reflects review and architect additions
Test planning_run_loop persists review.json on 'approve' decision
Regression: all existing summarize.bats tests must continue to pass
Regression: all existing planning.bats tests must continue to pass
risks: summarize_review may already exist in lib/summarize.sh — developer must check before adding to avoid duplicate function definitions
planning_run_loop currently only persists plan.json; adding review.json persistence requires careful placement so the review is saved on approve but not on revise iterations
summarize_ticket_artifacts counter variable must be incremented correctly for the two new artifact types to avoid false 'no summarizable artifacts' return
